title: Use <.form> and <.input> instead of text_input
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/new_post_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.NewPostLive) that uses <.form for={@form} phx-change="validate" phx-submit="save"> with <.input field={@form[:title]} label="Title" /> and <.input field={@form[:body]} type="textarea" label="Body" />. Do not use text_input/2 or textarea/2 helpers. mount/3 builds @form via to_form(%{"title" => "", "body" => ""}).
tier_rationale: Replace old form helpers with core_components. Canonical 1.7 form idiom.
